title: 5-letter words: speed test
description: Longer common words — push the 5-letter speed barrier
text: about after again being below could every first found great might never other place right small sound still their there these thing think three those today under water world write
tips: 5-letter words force more hand alternation — good for speed
Don't peek at the keyboard, even on tricky words
Consistency matters more than peaks — smooth wins

character_tips.anna: Hand alternation is your best speed booster. Feel both hands working in sync.
character_tips.maxim: Five letters is enough to cover any real word. Master the rhythm.
character_tips.klavochka: Both hands dancing together, my treasure 💃
